name: sensible-ralph
description: Autonomous overnight execution of Approved Linear issues, with safety, structure, traceability, composability, and deliberation.

approved_state.title: Approved state name
approved_state.description: Linear workflow state for issues ready to dispatch

in_progress_state.title: In-Progress state name
in_progress_state.description: Linear workflow state while a session is running

failed_label.title: Failed label
failed_label.description: Label applied when a session fails or exits clean

stale_parent_label.title: Stale-parent label
stale_parent_label.description: Label applied to In-Review children whose parent was amended

worktree_base.title: Worktree base directory
worktree_base.description: Directory under repo root for session worktrees

model.title: Claude model
model.description: Model to use for dispatched sessions

stdout_log_filename.title: Session log filename
stdout_log_filename.description: Per-session stdout log file (inside the worktree)
